notes:
## v0.4.2

This release brings automatic update notifications, with version checking and control available in the settings "About" section.

Changes since v0.4.0:

- [`0e54987`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/0e549873ce63f8a42113d02e0a6a089e99d031cc) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): README describes the two build workflows accurately
- [`f03ca54`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/f03ca541775566baa8ddb562c5f4044290c09ff0) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): rename actions and add a Build Only workflow
- [`ab6d2db`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/ab6d2dbddd6a5ed0639ff4e2436e5e48fd433b8a): chore: clean stale workflow comments after the CI removal
- [`079497b`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/079497b15d80509ad2d2fd2309f825bd5b8a52d2): chore: remove the manual-only CI workflow
- [`a2272d5`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/a2272d5fc550daea1d61f568645d59b2e6b885e6) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): job name says what it does (build artifacts and draft the release)
- [`4185371`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/41853710e1c33af59bd24d115d471eff0293c55f) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): CLAUDE.md reflects the one-trigger release flow
- [`f2e04db`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/f2e04dbb93d9b130e72576cfc5d64d7393753db2) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): the build workflow drafts the release itself; version 0.4.2
- [`1f7ee1f`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/1f7ee1f741e4e62ab9add72868e1dd53b2437eb7) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): manual builds attach to the release; the channel ships only on publish
- [`0b62453`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/0b62453d8e3b5cfcec67f0e3569284f3706103fb) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): publish job waits for the dmg instead of failing on an early publish
